untranslatable_reason: Signal requires parameterized thresholds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] for deviation in standard deviations, SMA period selection, and time-based exit bars—these placeholders cannot be mapped to specific allowed indicators without concrete values. Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_lower) could approximate deviation bands but the exact standard deviation multiplier is unspecified. Mean-reversion confirmation regime detection is not directly available as a single indicator.
translation_notes: Approximated using: (1) close price vs SMA_20 for mean reversion entry/exit, (2) india_vix (proxy for volatility regime) to confirm high volatility, (3) adx_14 < 25 to exclude trending regimes. Position direction determined by price relative to SMA. Original signal references VIX behavior; india_vix used as closest allowed proxy. Standard deviation thresholds would ideally use Bollinger Bands, but exact multiplier is undefined in source. Time-based exit set to 5 bars as reasonable default.
